name: F-35A Lightning II
description: Fifth-generation multirole stealth fighter designed for air superiority, ground attack, and ISR missions. The backbone of US and allied tactical airpower.

specialAbilities.name: Sensor Fusion
specialAbilities.description: Integrates data from all onboard sensors into a unified tactical picture, granting +15% situational awareness in combat.

specialAbilities.name: STOVL Capability
specialAbilities.description: B-variant enables short takeoff and vertical landing from austere bases or amphibious ships.
